variables.input:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.start" and event.provider == "jmeter"
| fields name=test.plan.name
| dedup name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| fields run_start = test.start.time
| dedup run_start
| sort run_start desc

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name) AND label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields name=test.script.name
| dedup name

fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name) AND label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| fields name=label[label]
| dedup name

3.title: Total Requests
3.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields sample=toDouble(label[samples])
| summarize TotalRequest=sum(sample)

5.title: Success / Error
5.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields sample=toDouble(label[samples]), error=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| fieldsAdd ReqError = sample*(error/100)
| fieldsAdd reqSuccess = sample-ReqError
| summarize Successful_Requests=sum(reqSuccess),
            Error_Requests=sum(ReqError)

6.title: Success Rate
6.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields error=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| summarize Success_Rate_Percentage = 100-sum(error)/count()

12.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fieldsAdd ReqError = toDouble(label[samples])*(toDouble(label[error.percent])/100)
| fieldsAdd reqSuccess = toDouble(label[samples])-ReqError
| fields Label=label[label], `# Samples`=toDouble(label[samples]), `Success`=reqSuccess, `Errors`=ReqError, `Avg (ms)`=toDouble(label[average.ms]), `Min (ms)`=toDouble(label[min.ms]), `Max (ms)`=toDouble(label[max.ms]), `Std.Dev.`=toDouble(label[std.dev]), `Error %`=toDouble(label[error.percent]), `Throughput/s`=toDouble(label[throughput.sec]), `Received KB/s`=toDouble(label[received.kb.sec]), `Sent KB/s`=toDouble(label[sent.kb.sec]), `Avg Bytes`=toDouble(label[avg.bytes])
| sort `Avg (ms)` desc

13.title: Avg Response Time
13.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Avg_Response_Time=avg(duration)

19.title: Total Requests
19.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Request_Count=count()

20.title: Success / Error
20.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Successful_Requests=countIf(http.response.status_code < 400),
            Error_Requests=countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400)

21.title: Success Rate
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Total_Requests=count(),
            Successful_Requests=countIf(http.response.status_code < 400)
| fields Success_Rate_Percentage = (toDouble(Successful_Requests) / toDouble(Total_Requests)) * 100

26.title: Test Start
26.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields test.start.time

27.title: Test Ended
27.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields test.end.time

28.title: Total Users (VU)
28.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields thread.num.threads

29.title: Ramp Up (sec)
29.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields thread.ramp.up.sec

30.title: Total Samples
30.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields thread.total.samples

31.title: Duration
31.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields test.duration.ms

32.title: Loop Count
32.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| fields thread.loop.count

34.title: Avg Response Time
34.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields avgResTime=toDouble(label[average.ms])
| summarize Avg_Response_Time=avg(avgResTime)

36.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Throughput=count(),
            Avg_Response_Time=avg(duration),
            Error_Count=countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
            Active_Users=countDistinct(vu),
            by: {bin(start_time, 1m)}

40.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields timestamp, samples=toDouble(label[samples]), avg_ms=toDouble(label[average.ms]), err_pct=toDouble(label[error.percent]), thread.num.threads
| fieldsAdd errors = samples*(err_pct/100)
| summarize Throughput=sum(samples),
            Avg_Response_Time=avg(avg_ms),
            Error_Count=sum(errors),
            Active_Users=max(thread.num.threads),
            by:{bin(timestamp,1m)}

48.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize {`Avg Response (ms)`=avg(duration)/1000000,
             `P95 (ms)`=percentile(duration, 95)/1000000,
             `Max (ms)`=max(duration)/1000000,
             `Throughput`=count(),
             `Successful`=countIf(http.response.status_code < 400),
             `Errors`=countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
             `CPU Time (ms)`=avg(span.timing.cpu)/1000000,
             `CPU Self (ms)`=avg(span.timing.cpu_self)/1000000,
             `DB Time (ms)`=avg(db.result.duration_sum)/1000000,
             `DB Rows`=avg(db.result.fetch_size)},
            by:{step_name}
| sort `Avg Response (ms)` desc

50.title: Max Response Time
50.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields maxRT=toDouble(label[max.ms])
| summarize Max_Response_Time=max(maxRT)

51.title: P95 Response Time
51.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize P95_Response_Time=percentile(duration, 95)

52.title: Top 10 Slowest Steps (JMeter avg ms)
52.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields Step=label[label], `Avg (ms)`=toDouble(label[average.ms])
| sort `Avg (ms)` desc
| limit 10

53.title: Top 10 Slowest Steps (Apps avg ms)
53.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize `Avg (ms)`=avg(duration)/1000000, by:{Step=step_name}
| sort `Avg (ms)` desc
| limit 10

54.title: Top 10 Error Steps (JMeter)
54.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(test.start.time, $Test_Run)
| filter in(test.script.name, $Script_Name)
| parse summary.rows, """JSON_ARRAY{JSON{}}:label"""
| expand label
| filter label[label] != "TOTAL"
| filter in(label[label], $Step_Name)
| fields Step=label[label], samples=toDouble(label[samples]), err_pct=toDouble(label[error.percent])
| fieldsAdd Errors = samples*(err_pct/100)
| filter Errors > 0
| fields Step, Errors
| sort Errors desc
| limit 10

55.title: Top 10 Error Steps (Apps)
55.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Errors=countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400), by:{Step=step_name}
| filter Errors > 0
| sort Errors desc
| limit 10

56.title: HTTP Status Code Distribution

57.title: Backend CPU Time by Step (top 10)
57.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| filter isNotNull(span.timing.cpu)
| summarize `CPU Time (ms)`=avg(span.timing.cpu)/1000000,
            `CPU Self (ms)`=avg(span.timing.cpu_self)/1000000,
            by:{Step=step_name}
| sort `CPU Time (ms)` desc
| limit 10

58.title: Backend Database Time by Step (top 10)
58.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, duration, http.response.status_code, start_time, span.timing.cpu, span.timing.cpu_self, db.result.duration_sum, db.result.fetch_size
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| filter isNotNull(db.result.duration_sum)
| summarize `DB Time (ms)`=avg(db.result.duration_sum)/1000000,
            `Avg Rows`=avg(db.result.fetch_size),
            by:{Step=step_name}
| sort `DB Time (ms)` desc
| limit 10

64.title: Test Run Catalog — copy a Start Time into the $Test_Run filter to pin a specific execution
64.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.type == "com.jmeter.test.summary"
| filter in(test.plan.name, $Test_Name)
| fields `Start Time` = test.start.time,
         `End Time` = test.end.time,
         `Duration (s)` = toLong(test.duration.ms / 1000),
         `VUs` = thread.num.threads,
         `Ramp Up (s)` = thread.ramp.up.sec,
         `Loops` = thread.loop.count,
         `Total Samples` = thread.total.samples,
         `Test Plan` = test.plan.name,
         `Event ID` = event.id
| sort `Start Time` desc
